title: coaching — declared entitlements
description: Seven entitlement keys. `coaching_capture` is the master feature (Small+). `coaching_profile_slot` is the slot-count integer (Small=10 / Medium=100 / Enterprise=null). `coaching_advanced_certifications` enables the verification workflow with document upload (Medium+). `coaching_skill_ratings` enables the rating system (Medium+). `coaching_multi_branch` allows cross-branch assignments (Medium+). `coaching_public_directory` exposes verified coaches to customer-facing UI (Medium+). `coaching_extended_retention` extends the retention window from 7 to 10 years (Enterprise).

entitlements.description: Master feature. When on, tenant may create CoachingProfile rows + downstream artifacts. When off, POST /api/v1/coaching-profiles returns 402 (feature not licensed). Small tier ON by default because every academy needs coach tracking — the flag exists to let a downgrade path turn coaching off entirely (rare, but coherent).
enforcedBy: CoachingProfileObserver.creating refuses when tenant does not hold the entitlement (returns COACHING_CAPTURE_NOT_ENABLED)
SDUI 'Create profile' button hidden when features array does not include 'coaching.capture'

entitlements.description: Cap on active CoachingProfile rows. null = unlimited. Enforced on create — refuses with COACHING_PROFILE_SLOT_EXCEEDED when the count of is_active=true profiles would exceed the cap. Deactivated profiles do NOT count against the slot.
enforcedBy: EntitlementProvisioner writes the cap to the plan's slot record; upgrades increase the cap without touching existing rows

entitlements.description: Enables the full certification workflow: admin verification, document upload (verifies via storage::File), verification-notes field, external verification-url. When off (Small), certifications are captured as a simple text ledger without the verify step + document_url is refused.
enforcedBy: CoachCertificationObserver.creating refuses document_url when gate is off (returns COACHING_CERT_DOCUMENT_REQUIRES_ADVANCED)
GET /coach-certifications/{cert}/verify returns 402 when gate is off (returns COACHING_CERT_VERIFICATION_NOT_ENABLED)
SDUI verify + upload-document buttons hidden when features array does not include 'coaching.advanced_certifications'

entitlements.description: Enables the CoachSkillRating aggregate. When off, POST /coach-skill-ratings returns 402. Read routes never expose ratings on Small tenants.
enforcedBy: CoachSkillRatingObserver.creating refuses when gate is off (returns COACHING_SKILL_RATINGS_NOT_ENABLED)
SDUI ratings screens + widgets hidden when features array does not include 'coaching.skill_ratings'

entitlements.description: Allows a coach to hold assignments at branches other than their primary branch (CoachingProfile.branch_id). When off (Small), the assignment observer refuses if `assignable.branch_id != coaching_profile.branch_id`.
enforcedBy: CoachAssignmentObserver.creating refuses cross-branch assignments when gate is off (returns COACHING_MULTI_BRANCH_NOT_ENABLED)
SDUI branch-picker restricts to coach's primary branch when features array does not include 'coaching.multi_branch'

entitlements.description: Exposes verified + is_accepting_new_athletes=true CoachingProfiles on the tenant's customer-facing site + Wave 4 booking flow. When off, the customer sees only aggregate info (e.g. 'certified coaches available') without picking a specific coach.
enforcedBy: Customer-facing booking flow queries `cop:accepting:{tenant_id}` cache only when features array includes 'coaching.public_directory'
Coach-picker widget on customer site rendered only when gate is on

entitlements.description: Extends retention windows: profiles 7y → 10y, ratings 2y → 5y. Applies to purge scans + rating expiry. Enterprise-only — the extra retention is legal-hold-friendly for regulated tenants (school-type, federation-affiliated).
enforcedBy: PurgeCoachingDataForErasedTenant honours the extended window when the tenant carries the entitlement at deactivation time (grandfathered per-record — a profile deactivated with the entitlement retains 10y even if the tenant later downgrades)
